---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Bunsen makes hard or impossible today? Describe
the use case, not just the solution — it helps us find the best fit.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches a config surface (`experiment.yaml`,
`agent.yaml`, `bunsen.config.yaml`) or a CLI command, sketch the shape.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've thought about solving this, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Links, prior art in other tools, or anything else that frames the request.
